evals.prompt: Understand this research project before helping me.
evals.expected_behavior: Read .research/ manifests; produce orientation memo with research question, datasets, experiments, entrypoints, open questions.

evals.prompt: Build a context map for this paper.
evals.expected_behavior: Same orientation memo; if .research/ is missing, ask before falling back to repo scan.
Concise orientation in 200-400 tokens; defer paper-level summary to paper-memory-builder.

evals.prompt: Orient me before we discuss reviewer comments.
evals.expected_behavior: Orientation memo plus highlight of `current_stage=rebuttal` if applicable.
